channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maps show this July 4th could be hottest ever in parts of U.S.
item.description: Dangerous heat and humidity could push heat index readings to 100–115 degrees from the Midwest to the East Coast.

item.title: Trump gifted lavish ring from Belgian diamond group that won tariff relief
item.description: The gift followed Belgium's diamond industry receiving removal of U.S. tariffs on diamond imports.

item.title: Pope Leo XIV calls for 'unity' as he accepts Liberty Medal in Philadelphia ceremony
item.description: Pope Leo XIV received the Liberty Medal from the National Constitution Center in Philadelphia.

item.title: Parade of ships sails through New York City in massive maritime gathering
item.description: Over 100 tall ships and navy vessels from around the world gathered in New York Harbor to celebrate America's 250th anniversary.
